backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining EnrollmentApplication and StudentQuestion types with functions to submit and retrieve applications and questions, storing them in mutable lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the addition of a credit line in the Footer component for Omar García Arias, a COBAD 35 student.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend components describing their burgundy/white color scheme, functionality, and layout structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining burgundy and white color palette for light and dark modes across all UI elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the COBAD 35 website.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component rendering all sections in order: HeroSection, AboutSection, LocationMap, EnrollmentForm, QuestionsForm, ContactButtons, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Section displaying four benefit cards with icons, images, and descriptions highlighting COBAD 35's academic excellence, collaborative environment, modern facilities, and proven success, all styled in burgundy theme.
frontend/src/components/ContactButtons.t: Fixed floating buttons for WhatsApp and Instagram contact positioned at bottom-right, opening respective apps with deep links.
frontend/src/components/EnrollmentForm.t: Enrollment form with validation collecting student information (name, email, phone, DOB, previous school, grade level), submitting to backend via React Query, and displaying success message.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer with burgundy background displaying school info, contact details, hours, student credit for Omar García Arias, and caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section with background image, burgundy gradient overlay, white text, graduation cap icon, and call-to-action buttons with smooth scroll functionality.
frontend/src/components/LocationMap.tsx: React component that displays an embedded Google Maps iframe showing the school location (COBAD 35 de Gómez Farías) with a MapPin icon, title, description, and a link to open in Google Maps.
frontend/src/components/QuestionsForm.ts: React form component for submitting questions with fields for name, email, phone, and question text; includes validation, loading states, and displays a success message with school branding after submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with delegation identity support.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Custom React Query hooks for submitting and fetching applications and questions data through the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a burgundy/white color scheme for both light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors in OKLCH format.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom burgundy color palette, OKLCH color system, custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), container settings, border radius variables, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state file for COBAD 35 school website with enrollment forms, WhatsApp/Instagram contact integration, and Google Maps location display. Tracks architectural decisions, existing features including hero section, about section, enrollment/questions forms, and burgundy/white color scheme.
